changeSet.author: Eugene A. Kalosha
changeSet.sql: INSERT INTO public.industries (id,parent_id,naics_code,naics_code_upper,"name") VALUES (1,NULL,11,NULL,'Agriculture, Forestry, Fishing and Hunting'), (2,NULL,21,NULL,'Mining, Quarrying, and Oil and Gas Extraction'), (3,NULL,22,NULL,'Utilities'), (4,NULL,23,NULL,'Construction'), (5,NULL,31,33,'Manufacturing'), (6,NULL,42,NULL,'Wholesale Trade'), (7,NULL,44,45,'Retail Trade'), (8,NULL,48,49,'Transportation and Warehousing'), (9,NULL,51,NULL,'Information'), (10,NULL,52,NULL,'Finance and Insurance'), (11,NULL,53,NULL,'Real Estate Rental and Leasing'), (12,NULL,54,NULL,'Professional, Scientific, and Technical Services'), (13,NULL,55,NULL,'Management of Companies and Enterprises'), (14,NULL,56,NULL,'Administrative and Support and Waste Management and Remediation Services'), (15,NULL,61,NULL,'Educational Services'), (16,NULL,62,NULL,'Health Care and Social Assistance'), (17,NULL,71,NULL,'Arts, Entertainment, and Recreation'), (18,NULL,72,NULL,'Accommodation and Food Services'), (19,NULL,81,NULL,'Other Services (except Public Administration)'), (20,NULL,92,NULL,'Public Administration'), (21,10,522320,52,'Financial Transactions Processing, Reserve, and Clearinghouse Activities'), (22, 14, 561, NULL, 'Administrative and Support Services'), (23, 8, 481, NULL, 'Air Transportation'), (24, 16, 621, NULL, 'Ambulatory Health Care Services'), (25, 17, 713, NULL, 'Amusement, Gambling, and Recreation Industries'), (26, 1, 112, NULL, 'Animal Production'), (27, 5, 315, NULL, 'Apparel Manufacturing'), (28, 5, 312, NULL, 'Beverage and Tobacco Product Manufacturing'), (29, 9, 515, NULL, 'Broadcasting except Internet'), (30, 7, 444, NULL, 'Building Material and Garden Equipment and Supplies Dealers'), (31, 5, 325, NULL, 'Chemical Manufacturing'), (32, 7, 448, NULL, 'Clothing and Clothing Accessories Stores'), (33, 5, 334, NULL, 'Computer and Electronic Product Manufacturing'), (34, 4, 236, NULL, 'Construction of Buildings'), (35, 8, 492, NULL, 'Couriers and Messengers'), (36, 10, 522, NULL, 'Credit Intermediation and Related Activities'), (37, 1, 111, NULL, 'Crop Production'), (38, 9, 518, NULL, 'Data Processing, Hosting, and Related Services'), (39, 5, 335, NULL, 'Electrical Equipment, Appliance, and Component Manufacturing'), (40, 7, 443, NULL, 'Electronics and Appliance Stores'), (41, 5, 332, NULL, 'Fabricated Metal Product Manufacturing'), (42, 1, 114, NULL, 'Fishing, Hunting and Trapping'), (43, 7, 445, NULL, 'Food and Beverage Stores'), (44, 5, 311, NULL, 'Food Manufacturing'), (45, 18, 722, NULL, 'Food Services and Drinking Places'), (46, 1, 113, NULL, 'Forestry and Logging'), (47, 10, 525, NULL, 'Funds, Trusts, and Other Financial Vehicles'), (48, 7, 442, NULL, 'Furniture and Home 'Health and Personal Care Stores'), (53, 4, 237, NULL, 'Heavy and Civil Engineering Construction'), (54, 16, 622, NULL, 'Hospitals'), (55, 10, 524, NULL, 'Insurance Carriers and Related Activities'), (56, 9, 516, NULL, 'Internet Publishing and Broadcasting'), (57, 5, 316, NULL, 'Leather and Allied Product Manufacturing'), (58, 11, 533, NULL, 'Lessors of Nonfinancial Intangible Assets except Copyrighted Works'), (59, 5, 333, NULL, 'Machinery Manufacturing'), (60, 6, 423, NULL, 'Merchant Wholesalers, Durable Goods'), (61, 6, 424, NULL, 'Merchant Wholesalers, Nondurable Goods'), (62, 2, 'Support Activities for Transportation'), (97, 9, 517, NULL, 'Telecommunications'), (98, 5, 313, NULL, 'Textile Mills'), (99, 5, 314, NULL, 'Textile Product Mills'), (100, 8, 485, NULL, 'Transit and Ground Passenger Transportation'), (101, 5, 336, NULL, 'Transportation Equipment Manufacturing'), (102, 8, 484, NULL, 'Truck Transportation'), (103, 8, 493, NULL, 'Warehousing and Storage'), (104, 14, 562, NULL, 'Waste Management and Remediation Services'), (105, 6, 425, NULL, 'Wholesale Electronic Markets and Agents and Brokers'), (106, 5, 321, NULL, 'Wood Product Manufacturing') ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET name=EXCLUDED.name, parent_id=EXCLUDED.parent_id;
